name: Flagsmith
description: Open-source feature flag and remote config service. Retrieve flag states per environment or identity, manage traits, and administer projects, environments, flags, and segments via the Admin API.

capabilities.name: flags_list
capabilities.description: Get all feature flags and remote config values for the current environment.

capabilities.name: flags_get
capabilities.description: Get the state of a specific feature flag by its name.

capabilities.name: identities_get
capabilities.description: Get all flags and traits for a specific user identity, creating the identity if it does not exist.

capabilities.name: identities_traits_update
capabilities.description: Set or update traits for an identity and retrieve its flags with segment overrides applied.

capabilities.name: admin_projects_list
capabilities.description: List all projects in the organization (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_environments_list
capabilities.description: List all environments in a project (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_environments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new environment in a project (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_flags_list
capabilities.description: List all feature flags in a project (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_flags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new feature flag in a project (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_flags_update
capabilities.description: Update a feature flag's state or value in a specific environment (Admin API).

capabilities.name: admin_segments_list
capabilities.description: List all segments in a project (Admin API).
